headline: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP) Makes Submissions Supporting $85B Merger with Norfolk Southern
summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is one of the most profitable industrial stocks to buy now. On May 28, the Surface Transportation Board confirmed that it has received the merger application from Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) and Norfolk Southern Corporation. The application paves the way for the proposed merger to move forward in the review process. […]

headline: Should Investors Buy CSX Stock Despite Its Higher Valuation?
summary: With CSX shares moving north, we assess the current positioning of the stock to determine if it's a good investment at this juncture.
